---
title: "Sequence Databases"
subtitle: "Lecture 02"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../../styles/slides.scss]
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
---

## Placeholder

Unreleased session, used to verify that the allowlist in `_quarto.yml`
actually keeps unpublished sessions out of the build.

## TODO

- GenBank, ENA, UniProt
- accessions and versioning
- what a database record does and does not guarantee
